description: Create a two-column content slide on expected changes in private equity exit channels, with a left-side table-style set of vertical bar charts by exit channel and a right-side bullet list of takeaways.

header.kicker: Development of the European private equity market
header.headline: The exit channel "sale to PE investors" is anticipated to develop favorably – IPO channel expected to decrease in importance

series.name: Dual track (e.g., IPO and M&A process)
Triple track (e.g., IPO, M&A process and refinancing)

main.title: "How do you expect the individual exit channels to change in 2019?"

items.text: Trend overview by exit channel is shown separately, with M&A with PE investors marked as the strongest positive development.
M&A with strategic investors, dual track, triple track, and IPO are indicated as broadly stable trends.
IPO stands out in the chart data with the highest expected decreases and very limited expected increase.
